# Vendored uPlot

- Version: 1.6.32
- Source: <https://github.com/leeoniya/uPlot/tree/1.6.32>
- License: MIT; see `uPlot.LICENSE.txt`

FTMON vendors these exact distribution files because UI-01 requires a fully
offline dashboard. uPlot was selected for its small footprint, temporal scales,
synchronized cursors, and high/low bands; the rationale and rejected broader
alternatives are recorded in `DESIGN.md` D4/D11.
